content: TikTok Content Posting API: unaudited clients restricted to SELF_ONLY (private) posting; public posting requires passing TikTok app audit. ~15 posts/24h cap per creator account, 6 req/min token limit, tokens expire 60-90 days. Instagram Graph API requires Professional/Business account + Meta app review with screen recordings; two-step container upload/publish flow. YouTube Data API has no comparable audit gate for single-channel personal use.
